info.title: Meshy API
info.description: Meshy API provides AI-powered 3D model generation capabilities including text-to-3D, image-to-3D, multi-image-to-3D, remeshing, retexturing, auto-rigging, animation, and account balance queries.

post.description: Creates a new text-to-3D task. Set mode to 'preview' for base mesh generation or 'refine' for texturing a completed preview.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of text-to-3D tasks.
Retrieve the current credit balance for your account.

image_url.description: Public URL or base64 data URI of the image

model_url.description: Public URL or data URI to 3D model

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token authentication using API key
